/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address -g -O0 -fsanitize=address -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chaos_headless.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chaos_headless.dir/runtime/ce_headless_main.c.o -o ../bin/chaos_headless  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zhongfangdao/chaos-engine/third_party/lua/lib ../lib/libengine_core.a -lm -lpthread -ldl /home/zhongfangdao/chaos-engine/third_party/lua/lib/liblua5.4.so -lbpf -luring
